title: ASCII Class ER Graph Layout
problem: Class and ER ASCII renderers are useful but still reject common multi-relationship layouts because their layout model is single-relation-only.

evidence.result: opened follow-on lane for class/ER multi-relationship terminal graph layout
added parser-backed tracer tests for class multiple relationships and ER unrelated-entity relationship layouts
introduced a shared terminal relationship-graph placement seam used by class and ER single-relationship rendering
implemented layered classDiagram chain and star multi-relationship ASCII rendering with explicit crossing-layout diagnostics

continue_policy.notes: Implement ER multi-relationship rendering next on top of the shared terminal placement seam. Keep color/style, state ASCII, true BT/RL flowchart directions, and richer XYChart layout out of this lane.
